front: What is the genesis block in blockchain technology?
back: The genesis block is the very first block in a blockchain. It is the foundation upon which all subsequent blocks are built and is hardcoded into the software of the application that utilizes its blockchain.

front: What is the block height of the Bitcoin genesis block?
back: The block height of the genesis block is 0. It is the only block in the chain with a height of zero, as it has no preceding block.

front: What notable message is embedded in the coinbase transaction of Bitcoin's genesis block?
back: The text 'The Times 03/Jan/2009 Chancellor on brink of second bailout for banks' is embedded, referencing a headline from The Times newspaper. This is often interpreted as a timestamp and a commentary on the instability of the traditional financial system.

front: Why can the 50 BTC reward from the genesis block never be spent?
back: The coinbase transaction of the genesis block is hardcoded and not recorded in the Bitcoin database (UTXO set) in the same way as later transactions. Therefore, the network does not recognize it as spendable currency.

front: What is a key cryptographic property that links the genesis block to the rest of the chain?
back: Each block contains the hash of the previous block's header. Block 1 contains the hash of the genesis block, creating an immutable cryptographic link from the very beginning of the chain.
